headline: Two OKR decisions — effective immediately: 1. We’re retiring the term “Rocks.” G...
quote: Two OKR decisions — effective immediately: 1. We’re retiring the term “Rocks.” Going forward, we use Key Results (KRs) only. Let’s rename Key results where we have word “Rocks” by the end of the week. 2. Every objective should have a maximum of 5 KRs.
